name: Linguini with Greens and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes until firm-tender (bake, steam, or microwave).
2. When cool enough to handle, cut the potatoes into 1-inch chunks.
3. Cook green beans in vegetable stock and refresh in cold water.
4. Cook pasta according to package instructions.
5. Heat half a cup of vegetable stock in a sauté pan; add onions and cook covered until tender.
6. Add garlic and red pepper flakes, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Add tomatoes and tomato juice, along with the potatoes, greens, and green beans.
8. Cook until the greens are wilted and the potatoes are heated through. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Toss cooked pasta with warm sauce.
